data.title: Haynes Awarded Construction Management Contract at T.F. Green International Airport
data.description: In Providence, Rhode Island, on March 6, 2026, Haynes Group, Inc. (Haynes) announced that they have been chosen as the construction manager for the Bruce Sundlun Terminal Modernization project at T.F. Green International Airport. This project involves renovating a 160,000 square foot terminal and has a budget of $64 million. Haynes expressed pride and honor in being selected for this significant project.

data.title: RD Management Announces LA Fitness Under Construction at Tampa RITHM
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on March 6, 2026, RD Management revealed that LA Fitness is currently being built at Tampa RITHM. This facility will span 29,944 square feet and will offer a modern, comprehensive sports club in the dynamic mixed-use redevelopment area.

data.title: Atlanticus to Host Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Call and Webcast on March 12, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET
data.description: Atlanta-based Atlanticus Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: ATLC) has scheduled a conference call and live webcast for March 12, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET, to address its financial results and operating performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. This event comes as the financial technology company continues its mission to provide inclusive financial services to millions of Americans through partnerships with banks, retailers, and healthcare providers.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield Named No. 2 Top Real Estate Brand
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield, a prominent global real estate services company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CWK, has recently been recognized as the second top real estate brand by The Lipsey Company.

data.title: Klarna Group Plc Clarifies Mechanics of March 9 Lock-Up Expiration
data.description: Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) has released a statement clarifying details about its lock-up expiration on March 9, 2026. The company aimed to provide accurate information to investors and market participants regarding the mechanics of the expiration and the processes necessary for pre-IPO shares to be traded on the NYSE. The statement also highlighted the liquidity opportunities available to shareholders before the expiration date. This release focuses solely on factual descriptions of the company's share structure and relevant processes.

data.title: Golden Hour Named Veterinary Telemedicine Service of the Year and Wins Dual 2026 Stevie® Awards for Customer Service Excellence
data.description: A prominent veterinary teleradiology company headquartered in Spring, Texas, has been honored with three significant industry awards in 2026. These accolades include the prestigious Silver Stevie® Award for Customer Service Department of the Year and the People's Choice Stevie® Award for Favorite Customer Service. The awards ceremony took place in New York City and recognized the company's excellence in customer service.
